config.EnableGlass.name: Enable Glass
config.EnableGlass.desc: Add glass case to the new displays similar to SVE.
config.BaseOrigin.name: Room Position
config.BaseOrigin.desc: Top left position of the new museum room, calculated from the bottom edge of the map
config.DoorPosition.name: Door Position
config.DoorPosition.desc: Where to put door that goes to the new room
config.MinRoomWidth.name: Min Room Width
config.MinRoomWidth.desc: Minimum width of the room, used if this is greater than the map's width
